'''Sibisime''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] [[Zakarisz Ghent]] was living there, in [[Saraban City]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] when he was approached by a man who offered him a job if he went to [[Chibias/Legends|Chibias]] and gave him a [[Passenger liner/Legends|spaceliner]] ticket. On Chibias, Ghent failed to make his connection with the strange man and got caught up in a plot involving stolen government secrets, only to be rescued by [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]. After a few days adventuring with the ex-[[Hand]], Ghent and Jade parted company and the youth finally made his connection with his mysterious employer—[[Talon Karrde]].

{{Planet-stub}}
